quote: You were born an original, don't become a copy!
author: Coco Chanel

quote: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood. Now is the time to understand more, so that we may fear less.
author: Marie Curie

quote: One never notices what has been done; one can only see what remains to be done.
author: Marie Curie

quote: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: We choose to go to the Moon in this decade and do the other things, not because they are easy, but because they are hard.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty. Anyone who keeps learning stays young.
author: Henry Ford

quote: You must do the thing you think you can't do.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: You should take the approach that you're wrong. Your goal is to be less wrong.
author: Elon Musk

quote: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favour.
author: Elon Musk

quote: One child, one teacher, one pen, and one book can change the world.
author: Malala Yousafzai

quote: I didn't learn to be quiet when I had an opinion. The reason they knew who I was is because I told them.
author: Ursula Burns

quote: Life is a series of building, testing, changing and iterating.
author: Lauren Mosenthal

quote: If you haven't failed yet, you haven't tried anything.
author: Reshma Saujani

quote: Never give up. People will always discount you, and you'll always get rejected. But set your sights high. Be boldly ambitious. Be relentless and never give up.
author: Reshma Saujani

quote: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
author: Albert Einstein
